zh.lifeSummary: 當Nichola Braybrooke於大約1375年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾時，她的父親Sir Gerard Braybrooke III41歲，母親Isabel Meynell38歲。她於1393年9月21日之前與Thomas Chaworth在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nichola Braybrooke于大约1375年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾时，她的父亲Sir Gerard Braybrooke III41岁，母亲Isabel Meynell38岁。她于1393年9月21日之前与Thomas Chaworth在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Nichola Braybrooke was born about 1375, in Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Sir Gerard Braybrooke III, was 41 and her mother, Isabel Meynell, was 38. She married Thomas Chaworth before 21 September 1393, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nichola Braybrooke est née environ 1375, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Gerard Braybrooke III, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Isabel Meynell, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Chaworth avant 21 septembre 1393, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nichola Braybrooke um 1375 in Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Gerard Braybrooke III 41 und ihre Mutter Isabel Meynell 38. Sie hat vor 21. September 1393 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Chaworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nichola Braybrooke è nata il circa 1375 nel Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, Sir Gerard Braybrooke III, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Isabel Meynell, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Chaworth prima del 21 settembre 1393, nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Nichola Braybrookeが約1375年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Gerard Braybrooke IIIは41歳，母Isabel Meynellは38歳であった。1393年9月21日以前にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでThomas Chaworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Nichola Braybrooke(이)가 대략 1375년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Gerard Braybrooke III(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Meynell(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1393년 9월 21일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 Thomas Chaworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nichola Braybrooke nasceu aproximadamente 1375, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Gerard Braybrooke III, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Meynell, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Chaworth antes 21 de setembro de 1393, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nichola Braybrooke родилась около 1375 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Gerard Braybrooke III было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel Meynell, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Chaworth перед 21 сентябрь 1393 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nichola Braybrooke nació aproximadamente 1375, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Gerard Braybrooke III, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Isabel Meynell, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Thomas Chaworth antes de 21 de septiembre de 1393, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas.
